result.markdown:
--- title: "Hedonic Housing Price Model: Philadelphia" subtitle: "" author: "Dalanda Jalloh, Huda Abdelnur, Yusuf Khalil" date: today format: revealjs: theme: simple slide-number: true transition: fade --- ## Research Question Our consultancy firm, Codes and Concepts, has been tasked with improving the city of Philadelphia's Automated Valuation Model (AVM) for the **Office of Property Assessment**. Our team developed a predictive model to further understand the effect of spatial and structural features on home sale prices. In this process, we explored home sale prices across the region identifying spatial trends and areas that may be challenging to predict. ## Data Sources - Property sales (2023-2025) - Census ACS (ACS5, 2023) - OpenDataPhilly (Transit, Crime, Elementary Catchment Zones, 311 Calls, Neighborhood Boundaries) ## Where Are Expensive Homes? ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](presentation_files/figure-revealjs/unnamed-chunk-2-1.png){width=960} ::: ::: ## What Drives Prices? ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](presentation_files/figure-revealjs/unnamed-chunk-3-1.png){width=960} ::: ::: ## What Drives Prices? ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](presentation_files/figure-revealjs/unnamed-chunk-4-1.png){width=960} ::: ::: ## Model Comparison ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Each layer improves prediction
Model Predictors R² Adj. R²
1: Structural 6 0.455 0.455
2: Structural + Spatial 10 0.487 0.487
3: Structural + Spatial + Neighbourhood & Catchment FE 11 0.716 0.714
4: Structural+ Spatial + Neighbourhood & Catchment FE + Interaction 11 0.682 0.679
5: Structural + Spatial + CT & Catchment FE 10 0.728 0.724
6: Structural + Spatial + CT & Catchment + Polynomial 11 0.701 0.697
7: Structural + Spatial + CT & Catchment FE - Cook's Outliers (Final) 11 0.731 0.727
````` ::: ::: Instead of using individual ACS predictors we found that using census tracts as fixed effects held better predictive capacity. In additition to this, we included elementary school boundaries. ## Model Comparison ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](presentation_files/figure-revealjs/unnamed-chunk-6-1.png){width=960} ::: ::: ## Top Predictors ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Predictor β p-value
exterior_condition8 -254625.71 0.008
number_of_bathrooms 25983.87 < 0.001
number_stories 11680.23 < 0.001
number_of_bedrooms 9001.98 < 0.001
total_livable_area 115.16 < 0.001
crime_avg_dist 35.54 < 0.001
illegal_avg_dist 20.85 < 0.001
````` ::: ::: ## Model Performance ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Metric Baseline Final Model Improvement
RMSE $143,310 $95,637 33.3%
MAE $105,462 $61,505 41.7%
R-Squared 37.6% 72.2% +34.6 pts
````` ::: ::: ## Hardest to Predict ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](presentation_files/figure-revealjs/unnamed-chunk-9-1.png){width=960} ::: ::: ## Recommendations * Data quality is critical * High-variance neighborhoods require deeper investigation * Consider separate models by smaller geographic boundaries ## Limitations and Next Steps * Historic character and architectural charm are unquantifiable * Not accounting for inflation * Further exploration into the $0-$500 transcations that made up almost 1/3 of the data set * Include more spatial features to account for spatial autocorrelation and general high variance in the data set ## Questions? Thank you

include-after-body:
<script>
  // htmlwidgets need to know to resize themselves when slides are shown/hidden.
  // Fire the "slideenter" event (handled by htmlwidgets.js) when the current
  // slide changes (different for each slide format).
  (function () {
    // dispatch for htmlwidgets
    function fireSlideEnter() {
      const event = window.document.createEvent("Event");
      event.initEvent("slideenter", true, true);
      window.document.dispatchEvent(event);
    }

    function fireSlideChanged(previousSlide, currentSlide) {
      fireSlideEnter();

      // dispatch for shiny
      if (window.jQuery) {
        if (previousSlide) {
          window.jQuery(previousSlide).trigger("hidden");
        }
        if (currentSlide) {
          window.jQuery(currentSlide).trigger("shown");
        }
      }
    }

    // hookup for slidy
    if (window.w3c_slidy) {
      window.w3c_slidy.add_observer(function (slide_num) {
        // slide_num starts at position 1
        fireSlideChanged(null, w3c_slidy.slides[slide_num - 1]);
      });
    }

  })();
</script>
